data.biography: 张浩，导演兼演员。代表作有《四平青年》、《二龙湖浩哥之风云再起》、《二龙湖浩哥之今生是兄弟》、《二龙湖浩哥之狂暴之路》等。

data.biography:
王一菲，1995年6月14日出生于湖南省，毕业于北京电影学院，中国内地影视女演员。

2017年，出演个人首部电视剧《漂亮的李慧珍》，从而正式进入演艺圈 。2018年，出演古装神话剧《香蜜沉沉烬如霜》。
data.name: 王一菲

data.biography: Vương Nhất Phi sinh ngày 14/6/1995 tại Hồ Nam, Trung Quốc. Từ khi còn học cấp 3, Vương Nhất Phi đã theo học tại khoa ca múa trực thuộc học viện Vũ Đạo Bắc Kinh. Đến năm 2013, cô thi đỗ khoa biểu diễn tại Học viện Điện ảnh Bắc Kinh (Bắc Ảnh).
data.name: Vương Nhất Phi

data.biography:
王一菲，1995 年 6 月 14 日出生於湖南省，畢業於北京電影學院，中國內地影視女演員。

2017 年，出演個人首部電視劇《漂亮的李慧珍》，從而正式進入演藝圈 。2018 年，出演古裝神話劇《香蜜沉沉燼如霜》。
data.name: 王一菲

data.name: giấc mơ mỹ little america
data.overview: Từ đạo diễn và biên kịch đạt giải Oscar của phim CODA, Giấc Mơ Mỹ - Little America là tuyển tập phim ngắn kể lại những câu chuyện hài hước, lãng mạn, cảm động, truyền cảm hứng và bất ngờ của người nhập cư ở Mỹ.

data.biography:
Jason Schwartzman (born June 26, 1980) is an American actor and musician. Schwartzman made his film debut in Wes Anderson's 1998 film Rushmore and has since appeared in six other Anderson films: The Darjeeling Limited (2007), Fantastic Mr. Fox (2009), Moonrise Kingdom (2012), The Grand Budapest Hotel (2014), The French Dispatch (2021), and Asteroid City (2023). He also has co-writing credit for The Darjeeling Limited. 

He is known for his roles as Gideon Graves in Scott Pilgrim vs. the World (2010). Scott Pilgrim Takes Off (2023), and the Spot, whom he voices in Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse (2023) and the upcoming Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse (2027). Schwartzman's other films include Spun (2003), I Heart Huckabees (2004), Marie Antoinette (2006), Funny People (2009), Saving Mr. Banks (2013), Big Eyes (2014), Klaus (2019), The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes (2023), and Queer (2024). He starred in the television series Bored to Death (2009–2011). He appeared in the fourth season of the FX anthology series Fargo (2020). He was an executive producer on the Amazon Prime show Mozart in the Jungle (2014–18), a series in which he also acted.

Schwartzman has released three albums through his solo musical project, Coconut Records. He was also the drummer in the rock band Phantom Planet.

He is a member of the Coppola family.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jason Schwartzman, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jason Schwartzman

data.biography:
ason Francesco Schwartzman (ur. 26 czerwca 1980) jest amerykańskim aktorem i muzykiem.

Schwartzman zadebiutował w filmie Wesa Andersona Rushmore z 1998 roku, a następnie wystąpił w siedmiu innych filmach Andersona: Pociąg do Darjeeling (2007), Fantastyczny pan Lisx (2009), Kochankowie z Księżyca. (2012), Grand Budapest Hotel (2014), Wyspa psów (2018), Kurier Francuski z Liberty, Kansas Evening Sun (2021) i Asteroid City (2023). Jego inne role filmowe to Spun (2003), Jak być sobą (2004), Maria Antonina (2006), Klaus (2019) i Spider-Man: Poprzez multiwersum (2023). Schwartzman zagrał w serialu telewizyjnym Znudzony na śmierć (2009–11) i pojawił się w czwartym sezonie serialu antologicznego FX Fargo (2020). Był producentem wykonawczym serialu Amazon Prime Mozart in the Jungle (2014–18), w którym również grał.

Schwartzman wydał trzy albumy w ramach swojego solowego projektu Coconut Records, wcześniej był perkusistą w zespole rockowym Phantom Planet.

data.name: Quân Hữu Vân
data.overview: 4 thiếu niên rời khỏi trường bước chân vào giang hồ, trên đường tìm kiếm chân tướng, làm sáng tỏ câu đố thân thế. Vì thành quân tử mà trải qua muôn vàn khó khăn nguy hiểm. Họ trọng đạo quân tử, thể hiện sự hiệp nghĩa lấy thân là sức, thực hiện công đạo nhân gian. Một bộ kỳ thư, một trận ân oán, một loại tín ngưỡng, một đoạn truyền kỳ.

data.biography: Sergei Vasilevich Makovetsky was born on June 13, 1958, in Darnitsa, a suburb of Kiev, Ukraine. Though he excelled at swimming and water polo and had aspirations to join the Soviet Olympic Team, his single mother encouraged him to pursue a more creative line of expression. When his application to study acting at Kiev Theatrical College was denied, Makovetsky moved behind the scenes working as a set decorator in Kiev before relocating to Moscow. Rejection from several Moscow theater schools and acting companies was bolstered by a more welcome rejection from the Soviet Army after Makovetsky gave a performance of imaginary illness symptoms so convincing that Army medical examiners excused him from military service. Accepted to the Shchukin Theatrical School at the Vakhtangov Theatre in Moscow, Makovsky graduated in 1980 and became a member of Vakhtangov Theatre’s company. For nearly three decades Sergei Makovetsky has earned critical praise, audience loyalty, and multiple awards (including the title of People’s Artist of Russia) in a variety of stage roles highlighted by a 9 season run as the title character in Moliere’s “Amphitrion” and as Trigorin in Chekhov’s “The Seagull”. His film work includes the eponymous role in Dutch director Jos Stelling’s “Duska” and an appearance alongside Nikita Mikhalkov in Aleksei Balabanov’s 2005 violent black comedy “Blind Man’s Bluff”.
data.name: Sergey Makovetskiy

data.biography: Родился 13 июня 1958 года в Киеве. В 1975 году, сразу после окончания школы, неудачно пытался поступить в Киевский театральный институт имени Карпенко-Карого, но на следующий год стал студентом Московского театрального училища имени Б.В.Щукина (класс Аллы Казанской и Владимира Поглазова), который закончил в 1980 году. С 1980 года - актёр Театра имени Евгения Вахтангова. Параллельно работает в других театрах: театре Романа Виктюка, МТЮЗе, антрепризах. Заслуженный артист Российской Федерации (19.09.1992). Народный артист России (1998).
data.name: Сергей Маковецкий

data.biography: Сергей Бурунов в 1993 году, как пилот-любитель, окончил курс "Лётная эксплуатация учебно-тренировочного самолёта Як-52" во 2-ом Московском аэроклубе имени В. Талалихина. В 1994-1997 годах учился в Качинском высшем авиационном училище лётчиков имени А.Ф. Мясникова (лётчик-инженер). В 1997-1998 годах учился на эстрадном отделении в Государственном эстрадно-цирковом училище имени М.Н. Румянцева. В 2002 году окончил Высшее театральное училище имени Щукина (художественный руководитель курса - М.А. Пантелеева). В 2002-2006 годах играл в Московском академическом Театре Сатиры.
data.name: Сергей Бурунов

data.biography: Sergey Burunov was born on March 6, 1977, in Moscow, RSFSR, USSR as Sergey Aleksandrovich Burunov. He is an actor, known for Politseyskiy s Rublyovki v Beskudnikovo (2017), House Arrest (2018) and Na igre (2009).
data.name: Sergey Burunov

data.biography: 田中有纪是日本的女性声优。
data.name: 田中有纪

data.biography:
Yuki Tanaka (田中 有紀, Tanaka Yuki, nacida el 26 de junio de 1998) es una actriz de doblaje (seiyu) japonesa de Tokio que pertenece a Style Cube. Fue miembro de las unidades de doblaje NOW ON AIR y Kleissis. Su color en NOW ON AIR era el verde, y el de su imagen en Kleissis era el rojo carmesí.

Tras presentarse en 2016 a la audición Kimikoe organizadas por Tohokushinsha y CS Family Theater, fue seleccionada junto a otras seis candidatas y formaron la unidad de doblaje NOW ON AIR (afiliada a Office PAC). Interpretó el papel de Kaede Tatsunokuchi en la película animada «Your Voice -KIMIKOE-» (Kimi no Koe wo Todoketai), estrenada el 25 de agosto de 2017, lo que marcó su grand debut como actriz de voz. Tras la suspensión de NOW ON AIR en julio de 2021, permaneció semi-afiliada a Office PAC, pero se transfirió a Hirata Office el 1 de junio de 2023. El 31 de marzo de 2025, dejó Hirata Office y se transfirió a Style Cube el 1 de abril.

En junio de 2024, anunció su debut como cantante solista bajo el sello Lantis. Lanzó su álbum debut, «Crier», el 2 de octubre del mismo año. El 11 de enero de 2025, realizó su primer concierto en solitario, «Tuki Tanaka 1st Live: Crier», en el Hulic Hall de Tokio.

Sus aficiones son el karaoke, dibujar ilustraciones, ver películas de terror y coleccionar vasos. Su película de terror japonesa favorita es «El pozo» (secuela de «Llamada perdida») También le gusta el universo místico. Su habilidad especial es el snowboard.
data.name: Yuki Tanaka
ยูกิ ทานากะ

data.overview: Sau khi Anna và Russ chia tay, chú chó Merv trở nên buồn bã. Cả hai buộc phải cùng chăm sóc Merv, và trong chuyến đi Florida, khi Merv dần hồi phục, mối quan hệ giữa họ cũng bắt đầu nhen nhóm trở lại.
data.title: Merv

data.biography: Masami Nagasawa (長澤まさみ) is a Japanese actress under Toho Entertainment. She has performed in many famous movies and television dramas including Crying out Love in the Center of the World, Nada Sousou, Dragon Zakura and Proposal Daisakusen. She graduated from Horikoshi High School in 2006. She is also known as "Ma-chan" or as Yamashita Tomohisa calls her "Maa-tan". On her radio show, she introduces herself as "Gasawa", a nickname chosen by fans. She is the daughter of Kazuaki Nagasawa, the former manager of the J. League team Júbilo Iwata.
data.name: Masami Nagasawa

data.biography:
长泽雅美 日本演员，出生于静冈县盘田市，家中有父亲长泽和明、母亲和哥哥。东宝艺能事务所旗下的艺人，于堀越高级中学毕业。

长泽是日本新一代女演员，演艺行业的开始是因为参加了第五回“东宝灰姑娘”比赛，而参加的原因则是因为朋友的母亲(生田智子)某天拿着剪报给她看，并鼓励她去尝试。2000年1月9日，长泽正美从35153位参赛者中脱颖而出，被选为最优秀奖，并从此加入艺能界中。她凭借可爱清纯的外观与自然的演技，近年很快地走红。

2004年时借着《在世界的中心呼唤爱》一片而成为多个日本本土电影颁奖典礼中史上最年轻的最佳女配角(17岁)，也因而成为深受各地年轻人所喜爱的清纯派偶像。此后主演的《棒球英豪》、《泪光闪闪》、《我爱芳邻》、《求婚大作战》、《20岁的恋人》等影视剧都大受欢迎，2008年在热门日剧《最后的朋友》中也有相当亮眼的演出。同年主演电影《暗堡里的三恶人》。2009年与小田切让在电视剧《我的妹妹》中扮演兄妹，与妻夫木聪等合作时代剧《天地人》，电影方面有爱情片《群青》。

父亲长泽和明是原日本国家足球队的中场，现在是浜松大学足球队教练。家中还有母亲和比她长三岁的哥哥。

2000年1月9日参加了由东宝主办的第五回东宝灰姑娘选拔赛。从35,153位参赛者中脱颖而出，成为史上最年轻（12岁）最高奖获得者，此后踏入日本艺能界。于同年公开的电影《Cross Fire》初次亮相，同时成为了青少年杂志《pichilemon》的专属模特。

2004年借着《在世界中心呼唤爱》一片，而成为日本国内多个电影奖项中，史上最年轻的最佳女配角得主（17岁），也因而成为深受各地年轻人所喜爱的清纯派偶像。 作为女演员的目标是松隆子，最喜欢的电影是Jose与虎鱼们。
data.name: 长泽雅美

data.biography:
Pushpa Narayan Robless, also known by her stage name Puspa Narayan, is a Malaysian entrepreneur, stage performer and actress of Malaysian Indian origin, who achieved popularity through her roles in several TV shows. Narayan has acted in Malay and Tamil Language dramas and movies.

She became famous after placing 2nd at the 2004 Dewi Remaja Model Search. She then joined Miss Malaysia Universe 2004 and placed First Runner-up and also won the Miss Love & Lace Photogenic and Miss Health and Beauty titles behind Andrea Fonseka who won the titles. She then branched into acting and find success in local entertainment industry.
data.name: Pushpa Narayan

data.biography:
M. Nassar is an Indian film actor, director and producer, who mainly works in the South Indian film industry. He is the incumbent president of the Nadigar Sangam.

Nassar made his acting debut in K. Balachander's Kalyana Agathigal (1985) portraying a secondary supporting role, before moving on to play villainous roles in S. P. Muthuraman's Velaikaran (1987) and Vanna Kanavugal. He played the protagonist in Yuhi Sethu's Kavithai Paada Neramillai, though his breakthrough role came through his performance as a police officer in Mani Ratnam's Nayakan. He subsequently became a regular in Mani Ratnam and Kamal Haasan's ventures, appearing in pivotal character roles in Roja, Thevar Magan (1992), Bombay (1994) and Kuruthipunal (1995).

Nassar made his directorial debut with Avatharam (1995), a film based on the backdrop of a folk art troupe. The film won critical acclaim, but failed to become a commercially successful venture.
data.name: Nassar

data.biography:
印度电影演员、导演和制片人，主要在南印度电影业工作。他是Nadigar Sangam的现任主席。

纳萨尔在 K. Balachander 的 Kalyana Agathigal （1985） 中首次亮相，饰演次要配角，然后继续在 SP Muthuraman 的 Velaikaran （1987） 和 Vanna Kanavugal 中扮演反派角色。他在 Yuhi Sethu 的 Kavithai Paada Neramillai 中扮演主角，尽管他的突破性角色来自他在 Mani Ratnam 的 Nayakan 中担任警察的表演。随后，他成为 Mani Ratnam 和 Kamal Haasan 的常客，在 Roja、Thevar Magan （1992）、Bombay （1994） 和 Kuruthipunal （1995） 中出演关键角色。

纳萨尔的导演处女作是《阿瓦塔拉姆》（1995），这是一部以民间艺术团为背景的电影。这部电影赢得了评论界的好评，但未能成为商业上的成功。
data.name: 纳赛尔

data.biography:
印度電影演員、導演和製片人，主要在南印度電影業工作。他是 Nadigar Sangam 的現任主席。

納薩爾在 K.Balachander 的 Kalyana Agathigal （1985） 中首次亮相，飾演次要配角，然後繼續在 SP Muthuraman 的 Velaikaran （1987） 和 Vanna Kanavugal 中扮演反派角色。他在 Yuhi Sethu 的 Kavithai Paada Neramillai 中扮演主角，儘管他的突破性角色來自他在 Mani Ratnam 的 Nayakan 中擔任警察的表演。隨後，他成為 Mani Ratnam 和 Kamal Haasan 的常客，在 Roja、Thevar Magan （1992）、Bombay （1994） 和 Kuruthipunal （1995） 中出演關鍵角色。

納薩爾的導演處女作是《阿瓦塔拉姆》（1995），這是一部以民間藝術團為背景的電影。這部電影贏得了評論界的好評，但未能成為商業上的成功。
data.name: 納賽爾

data.biography: John is an award-winning. classically-trained, character actor who has worked in CT theatre for nearly 30 years. He & his wife, Tanya Feduik-Smith, are Founders & Artistic Directors of Vagabond Theatre Company in Bridgeport CT. Pre-Covid, his sole focus was stage work. Occasionally playing small film roles as favors for friends. After Covid shuttered theaters he pivoted exclusively to films, including his award-winning performance as Bernie Davis in THE WOODSMAN; the lovable, foul-mouthed catcher, John Faiella, in EEPHUS; and the menacing Tucson in I'VE SEEN ALL I NEED TO SEE
data.name: John R. Smith Jnr.
